query:
INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_crm.deals (
                id, tenant_id, client_id, name, amount, pipeline, stage, created_at, updated_at
            ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                client_id = VALUES(client_id),
                name = VALUES(name),
                amount = VALUES(amount),
                pipeline = VALUES(pipeline),
                stage = VALUES(stage),
                updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
